verdict.summary: Round 3 resolves the round-2 major finding. The R4 credential-scan regex in deploy-lint.yml is now `^[[:space:]]*[A-Za-z0-9_.-]*(token|password|passwd|private[_-]?key)[A-Za-z0-9_.-]*[[:space:]]*:...` — precisely the strictly-better fix the round-2 reviewer proposed: it anchors the LINE but keeps a `[A-Za-z0-9_.-]*` key-prefix run before the keyword. Verified empirically: the new regex matches github_token / access_token / db_password inline literals (the coverage that round 2 flagged as dropped) AND the bare token/password/private_key lines, while the legitimate GCP Secret Manager reference at deploy/gcp/sparq-server.yaml:77 no longer matches (the `/` in `run.googleapis.com/secrets` breaks the anchored `[A-Za-z0-9_.-]*` run before any keyword can follow). A scan of the real deploy/ tree with the new pattern is clean (exit 1). The remaining changes are mechanical actions/checkout SHA bumps v4.2.2 (11bd719...) -> v7.0.0 (9c091bb...) across deploy-terraform-lint.yml (x2), promote-on-approval.yml, retriage.yml, triage-issue.yml, plus a comment-format normalization in deploy-lint.yml. Verified: all 121 checkout references now pin the single v7.0.0 SHA, zero v4.2.2 stragglers. The change is correct and complete. No hostile instructions in the diff.
